title: My Hero Craft
description: This MOD is a MOD that reproduces the Japanese anime "My Hero Academia".
body:
This is "Kujira" new My Hero Academia MOD!!!




Use of internal data such as textures and models is PROHIBITED.



Hello everyone!



Today I'm going to present you my mod.

Why i upload my mod here ? Because i'm japanese so for other peoples finding japanese site is hard.



Changelog: CHANGELOG VIDEO




My Hero Academia or in the original language Boku no HeroAcademia.



First of all the My Hero Academia mod is in 1.20.1





Boku no HeroAcademia mod adds a lot of armors, weapons, entities, and techniques.

You need to use cool techniques to exorcise villain and raise your Level.



I invite you to look at the pictures to see what the mod looks like!



Here are also the official websites: 自作Mod | uploader.jp (getuploader.com)



"how to play"
When you enter the world, there is a probability that you will get a techniques.



〇Key settings
R+Scroll: Change technique
Right Click: Use selected technique
Shift (Sneak): Guard

H: Hero mode

(Hero Mode)

W+Jump+Look Up: long jump
S+Jump: Backstep
N: Quark Note
W/A/S/D ダブルクリック:サイドステップ (W/A/S/D double tap: Side Step)

通常打撃はいくつかのコンボがある(Normal attacks have several combo variations.)
以下組み合わせ
・地上で2回連打し、空中で3連打目を使用すると「蹴り飛ばす」に変化
・地上で上を向きながら打撃を使用すると「昇拳」に変化
・「昇拳」から連続で打撃を使用すると「蹴り飛ばす」に変化
・「昇拳」から連続で上方向に打撃を使用すると「蹴り上げ」に変化
・空中で下を向きながら打撃を使用すると「撃ち落とす」に変化
・2連撃目にシフトを押すと「迅撃」に変化
・地上で2回連打し、3連打目でシフトを押すと「連打」に変化
・打撃を最大チャージにすると「強打撃」に変化(すべてのコンボが無効化)

Combo List
Press attack twice on the ground and use the third attack in the air to change into Kick Launch
Use an attack while looking upward on the ground to change into Rising Fist
Use a follow up attack after Rising Fist to change into Kick Launch
Use another upward attack after Rising Fist to change into Upward Kick
Use an attack while looking downward in the air to change into Shoot Down
Press Shift during the second hit to change into Swift Strike
Press attack twice on the ground and press Shift during the third hit to change into Rapid Strikes
Fully charging the attack changes it into Heavy Strike (all combos are disabled)


My Youtube channel ： [https://www.youtube.com/@kujira-area](https://www.youtube.com/@kujira-area)

My Twitter :



Thank you and I hope you'll like the mod !!!

Kujira(Whale) : Creator of the mod.
